shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files src/components/Tooltip src/utils | head -80 && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-tooltip delegated event listener non-element event target closest anchor resolution" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' src/utils/resolve-data-tooltip-anchor.ts && printf '\\n--- anchor registry ---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' src/components/Tooltip/anchor-registry.ts && printf '\\n--- anchor hook ---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-anchors.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --check src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx && git diff --check && git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx'
